creator: erj@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #5)

I think I'd want feedback from someone who might know more about how safe changing that number would be (jhb? kib?), but maybe a safe thing to do would be to just double the number to 16.

Ideally we'd try this out on a Sapphire Rapids platform, too, to see if even 16 is enough for those.
